en: TRIF - Total Recordable Injury Frequency (3-year average) is greater than industry:
Ericsson Safety Culture Review

It has been flagged in your Avetta account that certain Safety and Health criteria does not meet Ericsson’s requirements; therefore, Ericsson requires further documentation to review these specific deficiencies. Please go to your account dashboard for Ericsson and review the Flag Details tab to see the applicable line items your account is Red flagged for. You will be required to provide documents to address the specific Red flagged items. Ericsson’s variance process will also include a review of your company’s safety culture and documentation of safety related indicators for your company. Documents for verification will be in the form of tool-box topics, employee sign in sheets, photos, audits, training records, lessons learned, Safety alert, commitment letters and or policy changes. This requested information can be uploaded in the Ericsson Safety Culture Review section. Please return all documentation in 5 business days or sooner.
